product.name: Swiss Madison Well Made Forever SM-WK450-01C - Ivy Wall Hung Elongated Toilet Bundle, Glossy White
product.description: The Ivy Wall-Hung Kit comes with an elongated space saving toilet bowl, adding a traditional touch to any bathroom setting. The concealed in-wall tank has an adjustable height steel frame and large flush actuator opening for easy access to the inner tank and shut off valve once installed. The foam insulated tank protects from condensation and helps to reduce flush noise. The flush actuator provides a functional aesthetic component that completes this wall-hung toilet kit.
features: Dual Flush : The buttons for dual flush allow you to choose between a low 0.8 gpf light flush or a high 1.6 gpf full flush.
Carrier System: The 2x4 In-Wall toilet tank carrier is to be installed on 4" studs.
Access to Plumbing: Removable flush plate for easy access to plumbing.
Space Saving: With the water tank in the wall, the Wall-Hung toilet saves space in your bathroom and is aesthetically pleasing in design.
